'''Tuomi''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Senator/Legends|senator]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] who represented [[Bosch system/Legends|Bosch]] circa [[16 ABY/Legends|16 ABY]] and challenged [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo's]] credentials.

{{Char-stub}}
